title: Carolyn Questions — Ford Foundation Interview Prep
html:
Quick Feb-2021 prep list of 8 questions for Carolyn (a Ford Family Foundation contact / mentor) about the application, funding, alumni, and the emotional/logistical reality of judging hundreds of submissions — Yahir reverse-engineering the scholarship process from the inside.

carolyn ford mentor · ford family foundation · scholarship essay cycle · 2021 02 24 Ford Family Foundation Scholarship
